data.name: Hentai Tales: Isekai Uncle Reversal 2
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在完成棘手的難題時享受一個感性的故事！
使用板上的所有正方形連接數字
完成難題後，您將解鎖性感的新圖像和故事的下一部分！
您能完成每個難題並結識所有女孩嗎？

故事背景

有一天，我看著我的手機時在家中自慰，想像那些低頭看著我在我的cre腳下為我服務的廉價女人。
當突然閃爍的光線閃爍時，我來到了一個神奇的地方...

人物

Eluvia：

膿皰精靈王室的恥辱
完美無瑕的瓷皮
W-杯聖母密封劑
帶有100％完整精靈耳朵的“怪胎”

賽琳娜：

精靈帝國的皇后
自然懷孕的身體
凍結腐敗空間的美麗女巫
用英雄射精生下處女的邪惡人

Mira Milkbell：

星際山谷牧場的牛女孩。在雪紡管的下面，頂部懸掛著一對重的W杯乳房，乳暈飾有櫻花顏色，害羞。
毛絨牛的耳朵充滿了心情搖擺，蓬鬆的黑白尾巴總是不安。

Goldchime Lihuo：

狐狸女巫的女商人。火紅的紅狐狸的尾巴戴著日本超短的和服和黑色長筒襪，就像纏繞在獵物的腰上的鏈條。
耳朵上的金戒指上撒了謊，而達成交易時，下腹部的詛咒痕跡發光了。計算金幣時，尾巴尖端的玫瑰圖案就像燃燒的合同標記。

特徵

  • 20個美麗女孩的性感和色情圖像。
  • 一個夢幻般的色情故事，有著獨特的個性。
  • 如果您只想欣賞這個故事，就可以跳過難題。 （在難題期間按Enter）。
  • CG畫廊模式。 （完成拼圖後，單擊CG旁邊的左右按鈕）。

data.name: Hentai Tales: Isekai Uncle Reversal 2
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

One day I was masturbating at home while looking at my phone, imagining those cheap women who looked down on me serving me under my crotch.
When suddenly a bright light flashed and I came to a magical place...

Characters

Eluvia:

The shame of the Pustule Elf Royal Family
Flawless Porcelain Skin Spurned
W-Cup Holy Breast Sealer
A "Freak" with 100% Complete Elf Ears

Selena:

The Empress of the Elf Empire
Naturally Pregnant Body
The Beautiful Witch Who Frozen the Corrupted Space
The Evil Person Who Used the Hero's Ejaculation to Give Birth to a Virgin

Mira Milkbell:

The cow girl at Starfall Valley Ranch. Under the chiffon tube top dangles a pair of heavy W-cup breasts, with the areola rippled in cherry blossom color with shyness.
The plush cow ears sway with the mood, and the fluffy black and white tail always rolls up restlessly.

Goldchime Lihuo:

Fox witch business woman. Wearing a Japanese super short kimono and black stockings, the fiery red fox tail is like a chain wrapped around the waist of its prey.
The gold rings on the ear jingled with lies, and the curse mark on the lower abdomen glowed when the deal was reached. When counting gold coins, the rose pattern on the tip of the tail was like a burning contract mark.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
